description: Sensitive Path Protection - Block access to sensitive files and admin paths including environment configs, git repositories, CMS admin panels, database admin tools, backup files, and security metadata
expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "/.env") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/.git") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/wp-admin") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/phpmyadmin") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/admin/config") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/backup") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/.well-known/security.txt") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/server-status") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/server-info") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/debug") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/trace") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/actuator") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/backup.sql") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/.htaccess") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/.htpasswd") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/wp-login") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/xmlrpc.php") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/config.php") or (http.request.uri.path contains "/wp-config")

description: SQL Injection Prevention - Block requests containing SQL injection patterns in URI, query strings, and request body including SELECT, UNION, DROP, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, OR 1=1, SLEEP, BENCHMARK, and encoded variants
expression: (http.request.uri.path contains "SELECT") or (http.request.uri.path contains "UNION") or (http.request.uri.path contains "DROP") or (http.request.uri.path contains "INSERT") or (http.request.uri.path contains "UPDATE") or (http.request.uri.path contains "DELETE") or (http.request.uri.path contains "OR 1=1") or (http.request.uri.path contains "AND 1=1") or (http.request.uri.path contains "SLEEP(") or (http.request.uri.path contains "BENCHMARK(") or (http.request.uri.path contains "CONCAT(") or (http.request.uri.path contains "EXTRACTVALUE(") or (http.request.uri.path contains "UPDATEXML(") or (http.request.uri.path contains "WAITFOR") or (http.request.uri.path contains "CHAR(") or (http.request.uri.path contains "0x") or (http.request.uri.query contains "SELECT") or (http.request.uri.query contains "UNION") or (http.request.uri.query contains "DROP") or (http.request.uri.query contains "INSERT") or (http.request.uri.query contains "UPDATE") or (http.request.uri.query contains "DELETE") or (http.request.uri.query contains "OR 1=1") or (http.request.uri.query contains "AND 1=1") or (http.request.uri.query contains "SLEEP(") or (http.request.uri.query contains "BENCHMARK(") or (http.request.uri.query contains "CONCAT(") or (http.request.uri.query contains "EXTRACTVALUE(") or (http.request.uri.query contains "UPDATEXML(") or (http.request.uri.query contains "WAITFOR") or (http.request.uri.query contains "CHAR(") or (http.request.uri.query contains "--") or (http.request.uri.query contains "'") or (http.request.uri.query contains "OR%20") or (http.request.uri.query contains "AND%20") or (http.request.uri.query contains "%27") or (http.request.uri.query contains "%22") or (http.request.full_uri contains "../") or (http.request.uri.query contains "information_schema") or (http.request.uri.query contains "sys.tables") or (http.request.uri.query contains "pg_catalog")

description: Malicious Bot Blocking - Block requests from known malicious bot user agents and automated scanning tools including curl, python-requests, nikto, sqlmap, dirbuster, gobuster, nmap, masscan, zgrab, wget without referer, and httpie without referer
expression: (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "curl/") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "python-requests") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "nikto") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "sqlmap") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "dirbuster") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "gobuster") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "nmap") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "masscan") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "zgrab") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "wpscan") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "acunetix") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "nessus") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "openvas") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "burpsuite") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "ZmEu") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains " Havij") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "dirbuster") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "wfuzz") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "ffuf") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "feroxbuster") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "httpx") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "nuclei") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "subfinder") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "amass") or (http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "http.request.headers[\"user-agent\"] eq \"\"")

description: Dangerous File Extensions - Block access to files with dangerous extensions including database dumps (.sql), backup files (.bak), compressed archives (.zip, .tar, .gz), executables (.exe), shell scripts (.sh), Python scripts (.py), and configuration files (.conf, .cfg, .ini, .yml, .yaml, .json, .xml) that could expose sensitive data or enable remote code execution
expression: (http.request.uri.path contains ".sql") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".bak") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".zip") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".tar") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".gz") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".exe") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".sh") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".py") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".conf") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".cfg") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".ini") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".log") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".sql.gz") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".tar.gz") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".tgz") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".rar") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".7z") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".bat") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".cmd") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".ps1") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".dll") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".so") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".war") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".jar") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".class") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".php") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".asp") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".aspx") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".jsp") or (http.request.uri.path contains ".cgi")
